content.en:
Mutated Perfection Grade Ancestral Fu: Immortal Resurrection

This is the Stone Dragon Demon Lord's Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment, and it is a Mutated Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment.

After Ye Tian fused this mutated perfect-level ancestral endowment, he knew about the situation of this perfect-level ancestral endowment.

The so-called mutation is to use some special treasures to make the perfect-level ancestral endowment complete the mutation, but this mutation is good and bad, sometimes it is stronger than the original perfect-level ancestral endowment, but it may be weaker than the original.

Therefore, the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment Mutation is full of unknowns.

However, the Immortal Resurrection Mutated Perfect-level Ancestral Fu has undoubtedly been greatly strengthened, and it is not much stronger than the normal Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment.

The function of immortal resurrection is to urge this perfect-level ancestral endowment before being killed, so that it can be resurrected somewhere in the near future.

But.

Immortal resurrection has flaws, and other perfect controllers may not know about it, but after he obtained this mutated perfection-level ancestral endowment, he naturally knows the flaws of this talent.

Immortal resurrection cannot be cast often, once it is cast once, it requires an interval of 10,000 eternal years, and in this interval, once killed, it will really fall.

Second, immortal resurrection can only be performed up to nine times, and after nine times, immortality can only be reduced to a talent for rapid recovery, and has no ability to resurrect.

Third, the resurrection of the undead requires a medium, that is, a certain creature needs to be cultivated into a vessel for immortality and resurrection in advance, otherwise it cannot be resurrected out of thin air. As a container, I didn't know that I was a container at first, and I would only know it at the moment of death, but it was too late.

In addition, Immortal Resurrection can also control the life and death of the container.

"Immortality can only be resurrected nine times? Something is wrong, according to the Lord of Time, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord has been killed by them many times, definitely more than nine times. If it was only nine times, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord would not dare to be so arrogant!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He pondered for a moment, and probably knew why.

"It seems that the Stone Dragon Demon Lord has created a similar secret technique by mutating the Perfect Grade Ancestral Immortal Resurrection, and this secret technique has no restrictions on resurrection!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

For him, the Immortal Resurrection Mutation Perfection Grade Ancestral Fu is still good.

Although he has a copy body, the fall of the copy body can also be quickly condensed.

But I'm afraid that one day, an incomparably terrifying powerhouse will directly kill his copy body and other bodies in an instant, making him completely fall, and the immortal resurrection will play a role.

Therefore, this talent can also be regarded as a life-saving hole card.

"Let's refine the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit first, it should be able to greatly increase the potential of my control body. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he began to devour the Golden Fruit of the Hundred Desolations.

Rumble!

A Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit was swallowed into Ye Tian's abdomen, and it immediately began to be refined.

Soon, the energy of the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit was integrated into Ye Tian's control body, and the extreme creation substance enhanced the potential of the control body, as well as slightly refining the control body to increase the strength of the control body.

Time passed slowly, and this Hundred Desolations Golden Fruit was refined.

"The effect is so good, much better than the Extreme Gold Liquid!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, he continued to refine the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit.

One after another Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits were thoroughly refined by Ye Tian, becoming his potential and heritage.

After refining the six Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits, Ye Tian's strength did not improve much, but his potential increased significantly, and the limit of his future control body also increased by a cut.

Time flies.

Ye Tian used all kinds of resources to constantly improve his will and control his body, although he was still a long way from the peak of the Extreme Creation Realm half-step Perfect Controller, but he had to practice hard, and one day he would reach the current extreme, so as to impact the peak of the Creation Realm Half-step Perfect Controller Realm.

Of course, he is also contemplating the changes in the Endless Path and striving to comprehend the changes in the Endless Path to 3.3 billion changes and form the perfect mark of the Endless Path.

Before you know it, more than 10,000 eternal years have passed.

this day.

When Ye Tian's copy body was looking for a perfect-level ancestral gift outside, he suddenly felt the surrounding time and space freeze, and an extremely terrifying aura permeated.

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord!"

Ye Tian looked startled.

Moreover, this aura actually emanated from his body.

Obviously, when the Stone Dragon Demon Lord blew himself up, he actually left a trace of aura on him, and this aura was so hidden that even he didn't perceive it, and even the Lord of Time didn't notice it.

"This guy is indeed terrifying, no wonder the Lord of Time is so jealous. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's consciousness was pulled into a space-time area, and a figure walked over, it was the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

Of course, the body of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was not here, it was just that he had formed a projection of his will with the help of the breath in Ye Tian's body.

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord, you have left a breath mark on me?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"Little one, yes, I left a breath mark on you, but don't be afraid, I'm not interested in killing, anyway, there is a big opportunity for you. "

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said.

"Big chance?"

Ye Tian didn't know why.

At this time, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord said: "Little guy, you should have heard of my deeds, my strength is about the same as your Lord of Time of the Daoless Tower, but in terms of clever means, he is far inferior to me." For example, the breath on your body, he can't find it. Moreover, I can continue to resurrect, which the Lord of Time cannot. In short, I can't be killed. Do you want to be like me, to become an immortal being, no matter who you can't kill?"

"Think, could it be that you can teach me this method?" Ye Tian deliberately followed his words.

He was also curious about what the Stone Dragon Demon Lord had come to him for, so it was better not to turn his face for the time being.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord laughed and said, "Of course I can teach you. To tell you the truth, your talent potential is very good, so I want to take you as an apprentice. As for the Pathless Tower, there is only a limit to what you can do. The reason why I have the ability to kill is because I have created a secret art, and I can pass it on to you. However, the premise is that you must become my disciple and assist me in serving as an internal agent in the Wudao Tower. "

"Why should I believe you?" Ye Tian asked.

In other words, it is someone else's absolutely terrifying secret technique that will not be killed forever, so the others can't really agree.

But Ye Tian didn't have any interest, but he also wanted to know what those secret techniques were.

"I can teach you first, so that you know the sincerity of this seat!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said.

Now it was Ye Tian's turn to be shocked, and if he taught the secret technique in advance, wasn't he afraid that he would regret it?

Soon.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord transmitted a secret technique to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian directly accepted this secret technique.

"Infinite resurrection!"

This is the name of this secret art, a secret art that can be resurrected indefinitely.

And this secret technique is very similar to the immortal resurrection mutation perfection level ancestral endowment, but there is no limit to the number of times.

On the surface, this secret art is perfect.

However, Ye Tian quickly sensed that something was wrong.

"The secret technique is true, but if there is no mutated perfection-level ancestral endowment immortal resurrection, if you forcibly practice this secret technique, you will be controlled by the stone dragon demon lord, this secret technique is based on the mutated perfection-level ancestral endowment as the core, without this core, it will be incomplete. Moreover, it will be reduced to a container. Good fellow, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord is digging a hole for me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And this pit, others really can't find it, if it weren't for the fact that he copied the stone dragon demon lord's mutated perfection-level ancestral endowment immortal resurrection, it would be difficult for him to detect it.

Moreover, the secret art is real, and almost no strong person can resist such a temptation.

"Maybe you can pretend to take refuge in the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, and reap some benefits by the way. He thinks that I will definitely practice infinite resurrection, and I will definitely be controlled by him, it is better to ask for more benefits, and he will definitely agree!"

Ye Tian smiled darkly.
